name_en: 👏👏YSL Saint Laurent = Another hot new release🔥. This cross-stitch style has been incredibly popular lately. This veteran designer couldn't miss it. The strings look like mysterious warriors guarding their owners—loyal and aloof. Top-grain calfskin with caviar texture, vacuum IP plating, high recognition. You know it's SLP from afar. 30X20X8cm, Model=26808
